creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
REPOCOPY request for next ports: 
graphics/libwpg => graphics/libwpg01 (maintained by myself)
textproc/libwpd => textproc/libwpd08 (changes approved my current maintainer)

This step required for upcoming libwpg/libwpd upgrade to provide support for not-yet-switched-to-new-API software
